emails.subject: Re: Follow-up
emails.body: Re: Follow-up Eric, Mandeep Chahal, Ainsley Gaddis, Sofya Tamarchenko, Elena Chilkina, James Aimone should not count. M. Chahal was transferred to the New Company, the rest are summer interns (gone back to school), or part-time high school or college kids. I shall walk around and remind the rest of the crowd about the deadline. Vince Eric Thode@ENRON 08/25/2000 02:31 PM
